nasb.text: “If I were to cause wild beasts to pass through the land and they depopulated it, and it became desolate so that no one would pass through it because of the beasts,

esv.text: “If I cause wild beasts to pass through the land, and they ravage it, and it be made desolate, so that no one may pass through because of the beasts,

cnv.text: 如果我使猛獸經過那地，蹂躪那地，使它荒涼，以致因為這些獸的緣故，沒有人敢經過；

ccb.text: 倘若我使猛兽在那里横行、肆虐，以致那里荒凉、人踪绝迹，
